get.summary: List and filter(search) for contact information
get.description: Filtering can be done by wildcard search

get.summary: Get multiple contacts by their contact codes
get.description: Fetch a batch of contacts by providing a comma-separated list of contact codes.

get.summary: Batch lookup of contacts by contact code
get.description: Lean by default — returns base contact fields with empty phone/email/address arrays. Set `includePhone`, `includeEmail`, `includeAddress`, or `includeRelations` to include those joins. Missing contact codes are simply absent from the response.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Contact code(s) to look up. Repeat the parameter for multiple codes, e.g. ?code=P123&code=P456.

parameters.name: includePhone
parameters.description: Include phone numbers in the response.

parameters.name: includeEmail
parameters.description: Include email addresses in the response.

parameters.name: includeRelations
parameters.description: Include related contacts (god man/förvaltare and annan fakturamottagare, both directions) in the response.

get.summary: Get a single contact by canonical id (contact code)
Get the trustee of a contact
List contacts by national id (Personnummer / Org.nr)
